name: io.github.nirholas/marketplace-mcp
title: three.ws Marketplace
description: Browse and discover the public three.ws agent marketplace and skills catalog. Read-only.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves /api/marketplace and /api/skills. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds. These are fast public read endpoints, so the default is modest.
